finding_results.notes: Ferrand now leaves Abel with a physical sample of tarred fuse and a concrete invitation to a next-night meeting at the Gentilly lime sheds, giving Elise an observable operational hook rather than inference alone.

The supper confrontation now carries recurring Elise interiority through bodily sensation, interpretive thought, and live reading of Ferrand, Abel, and Lucien, preventing the exchange from flattening into external-only dialogue.
